Everything You Need to Secure Your Perfect Domain

Register, manage, and protect your domain with powerful tools and reliable support.

Domain Protection

Domain Lock ensures that your domain name is protected from unauthorized transfers or hijacking attempts. Once enabled, no changes can be made to your domain without proper authentication, keeping your digital identity safe.

Unauthorized Transfer Prevention

Domain Lock prevents hackers or third parties from transferring your domain without permission. Even if login details are compromised, your domain remains secure until you manually unlock it.

Ownership Verification

Only verified domain owners can approve changes such as registrar transfer or DNS updates. This extra layer of verification protects your domain from fraud and accidental changes.

DNS Change Security

With Domain Lock enabled, critical DNS and nameserver changes are restricted. This ensures your website traffic is not redirected to malicious or unauthorized destinations.

Instant Alerts

You receive instant notifications whenever a request is made to unlock or modify your domain. This allows you to quickly respond to suspicious activity and maintain full control.

Brand & Identity Safety

By securing your domain name, Domain Lock protects your brand reputation, email services, and online presence from cyber threats, phishing attempts, and domain theft.

Domain Locking

We keep your domains secure with domain locking, ensuring unauthorized transfers are a thing of the past. You're in control – easily unlock domains whenever you choose, providing you with the peace of mind that your online assets are always in safe hands.

With the power to unlock at your fingertips, you maintain ultimate control over your online assets, ensuring a secure and flexible domain management experience.

Domain locking at techhost prevents unauthorized domain transfers, ensuring your domain remains secure and under your control.
